scripts.build: corepack pnpm exec turbo run build
scripts.check: corepack pnpm lint && corepack pnpm typecheck && corepack pnpm test && corepack pnpm validate:docs
scripts.dev: corepack pnpm exec turbo run dev --parallel
scripts.lint: corepack pnpm exec turbo run lint && eslint scripts --max-warnings=0 && corepack pnpm lint:docs
scripts.test: corepack pnpm exec turbo run test
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm exec turbo run typecheck && tsc --noEmit --project tsconfig.scripts.json
